records.name: Light of Protection
records.description: Increases PvE Damage Boost and PvE Damage Tolerance by 10.5% and PvP Damage Boost and PvP Damage Tolerance by 5.25% for the caster and nearby party members. Does not stack with the Damage Boost effect from the Chanter skill [Undefeated Mantra] and only the highest skill level effect applies. If both skills are the same level, Undefeated Mantra will be applied.
records.descriptionFr: Augmente bonus de dégâts PvE et résistance aux dégâts PvE de 10.5% et bonus de dégâts PvP et résistance aux dégâts PvP de 5.25% pendant le lanceur et proches membres du groupe. Does not charge avec the Damage Boosteffet de the Chanter skill [Undefeated Mantra] et only the highest skill leveleffet applies. If both skills are the same level, Undefeated Mantra will be applied.

records.name: Survival Willpower
records.description: Increases the caster's Status Effect Resist by 16.5% . Increases PvE Damage Tolerance by 12% and PvP Damage Tolerance by 6% for 5s when afflicted with Stun, Knockdown, Airborne, Frost, or Fear. Increases Status Effect Resist by 10% for 5s when hit while afflicted with Stun, Knockdown, Airborne, Frost, or Fear (up to 10 stacks). Damage Tolerance Increase Cooldown: 60s Status Effect Resist Increase Cooldown: 1s
records.descriptionFr: Augmente le lanceur's Status Effect résistance de 16.5%. Augmente résistance aux dégâts PvE de 12% et résistance aux dégâts PvP de 6% pendant 5 s lorsque affectée par étourdissement, renversement, projection en l’air, gel, or Fear. Augmente Status Effect résistance de 10% pendant 5 s lorsque hit pendant que affectée par étourdissement, renversement, projection en l’air, gel, or Fear (up à 10 charges). résistance aux dégâts Increase temps de recharge: 60s Status Effect résistance Increase temps de recharge: 1s
